meta.title: Gastown Starter Corridor (deterministic fallback)
buildNotes: Starter corridor fallback is active because required offline civic source files are missing.
This world is intentionally human-scaled and deterministic for readability; it is not GIS-accurate Gastown reconstruction.

landmarks.label: Waterfront threshold
landmarks.cue: Station canopies give way to brick-front Gastown blocks.

landmarks.label: Steam Clock approach
landmarks.cue: Denser storefront rhythm, pavers, and curb clutter build toward the clock node.

landmarks.label: Post-clock continuation
landmarks.cue: The corridor loosens into longer facades and a quieter continuation east.

bounds.edgeMessage: Stayed within the starter street corridor.
bounds.resetMessage: Returned to the starter street corridor.
